home.heroLead: Raw honey and handmade beehives from the Pamir.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: A family apiary in the heart of the Pamir
about.body: Pchelovod is a small family operation at the foot of the Fann mountains. We tend our hives through the short but intense alpine season — from the first thaw to the last meadow bloom. The honey is raw, unfiltered, and moves as slowly as the bees that make it.

honey.label: Our Honey
honey.title: From the mountain meadows
honey.lead: Each variety reflects a different altitude, flora, and moment in the season.
honey.v1desc: Multi-floral, collected from alpine meadows at 2,500 m. Deep amber with a complex, slightly resinous finish.
honey.v2desc: Pale gold, slow to crystallize. Delicate aroma and clean sweetness from the lowland acacia groves.
honey.v3desc: Rare. Harvested above 3,000 m during the brief July bloom. Intensely aromatic, limited quantity each year.

beehives.label: Beehives
beehives.title: Handmade for mountain conditions
beehives.body: Our wooden hives are built from local timber using traditional Tajik techniques passed down through three generations. Each box is sized for mountain colonies — compact enough to carry up steep trails, robust enough to withstand harsh winters.
beehives.detail3: Available to other apiaries on request

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: We respond to every message personally. For urgent inquiries, reach us on Telegram.

form.name: Your name
